notes: Wizard copy trim. Strips the explanatory ledes from all 5 steps and neutralizes the helper text. 'No tapping needed — everything's done with the knob' (ambiguous — readers parse 'taps of the knob') is gone entirely. Headings are now nouns: Setup / Turn clockwise / Select speaker / Turn to adjust volume / Done. Dynamic helpers shed checkmarks and emoji: 'direction set', 'direction flipped — turn again', 'volume changed', 'returning to dashboard'.
